textPlain: Nice that someone takes the time to crunch the number, thanks! I know there's some community effort in how to use free-threaded Python: https://py-free-threading.github.io/I've found debugging Python quite easy in general, I hope the experience will be great in free-threaded mode as well.
We already have PyPy and PyPI, so I think we are cosmically required to call Python 3.14 PyPi
I thought WSGI already used subinterpreters that each have their own GIL
